title: KandyToys Eco-friendly Toy Helicopter | Sustainable Gift Kids Toys | Two Assorted Colours - One Sent at Random
features: Soar to New Heights: Introducing our Bioplastic Toy Helicopter, the eco-friendly, high flying adventure that your child will absolutely love!

Environmentally Responsible Play: This helicopter toy is made from wheat straw, making it a fantastic choice for eco-conscious families. Join the movement to protect our planet, one playtime at a time. Two colours available - One sent at random
Develop Skills: Help your child develop their hand-eye coordination, gross motor skills, creativity and imagination.

The Gift of Adventure: Whether it's a birthday, holiday, or just because, this Bioplastic Toy Helicopter makes an incredible gift for any budding aviator. Encourage their dreams of flying and teach them the value of sustainability in one thrilling package!
description: The Eco Flyers Bioplastic range are sustainable and environmentally-friendly toy vehicles designed to entertain children while teaching them about the importance of being conscious of their ecological footprint. This eco-friendly toy is made entirely from bio-plastic, which is derived from renewable resources and does not contribute to plastic waste accumulation. The vehicles feature vibrant colour that captures the attention of children and stimulates their imagination. With a length of 20cm, the vehicles are ideal for little hands to grip and maneuver. Its lightweight design ensures easy mobility. The bio-plastic material used in the manufacturing of this toy is non-toxic and free from harmful substances, ensuring the health and safety of children during playtime. It also withstands wear and tear, ensuring the toy's durability and longevity. The Eco Flyers Bioplastic toys not only provides hours of entertainment but also serve as a valuable educational tool. Through play, children learn the significance of using sustainable materials and the importance of reducing plastic waste. This toy encourages their creativity, fine motor skills, and imaginative play while instilling a sense of responsibility towards the environment. With its eco-friendly design, vibrant color, and educational benefits, the Eco Flyers Bioplastic toys are an excellent choice for parents and caregivers who want to promote a greener mindset and sustainable play experiences for their children. Vehicles are approximately 20cm x 13cm x 10cm (varies slightly between styles)
